zh.title: 硬氪专访 | 智源研究院院长王仲远：VLA不会死，但世界模型是未来
zh.content:

en.title: Interview with Hard Krypton | Wang Zhongyuan, Dean of Zhiyuan Research Institute: VLA will not die, but the world model is the future
en.content:
[36氪] The author | Qiu Xiaofen | Yuan Silai In the past few months, the "World Model" has rapidly expanded from an academic cliche to a keyword in the AI and robotics industry. Behind the industry's gaze is tangible anxiety. On the one hand, after the brutal growth of the past two years, physical intelligence has exposed the current shortcomings of AI in the physical world - robots can recognize objects, but they do not understand "pushing the cup will fall"; they can understand the instructions, but they cannot predict "how much force is needed to screw the bottle cap". The world model is trying to make up for this shortcoming, so that robots can learn the laws, causes and effects of the physical world. In other words, the relationship between the world model and the body's intelligence is essentially the relationship between the "brain" and the "body"....
